minor_issues: Phase evidence is structurally incomplete against PROJECT_PIPELINE.md because build_golgi.py and phase_01_builder_report.json define only one scaffold render path, while completed phases are expected to provide wide, close component, and export inspection review views.
CREATED_COMPONENTS and INCOMPLETE_COMPONENTS are hard-coded in build_golgi.py instead of being validated from component_manifest.json, which leaves future phases vulnerable to manifest drift.

The non-manifest WholeCell_ContextSocket_ReviewGhost is correctly marked review_only and export_exclude, but no centralized export filter or collection structure exists yet to prevent accidental inclusion in later export scripts.
Render failure handling only catches RuntimeError from missing bpy; Blender operation failures during save or render would not write a pending report with the failure reason.
required_fixes: Before final Phase 1 gate closure, add or explicitly defer the missing pipeline review views: wide view, close component view, and export inspection view.
In the next builder revision, load component_manifest.json or add a manifest validation step so created and incomplete component names are checked against the source manifest.
Before export phase work begins, introduce a clear export collection or filtering convention that excludes objects marked export_exclude.
